languages.text: [TO BE CHANGED TEXT&ETUDES] Начатые на Заркове исследования в конце концов были свернуты, ибо хранимые миром знания несли в себе слишком много признаков богохульства.
The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.
languages.original_text: Начатые на Заркове исследования в конце концов были свернуты, ибо хранимые миром знания несли в себе слишком много признаков богохульства.

traits.locale_text: The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.
The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.
The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.

languages.text: ザルコフの研究は、世界に存在する知識が神への冒涜の標識を多く含んでいたため、最終的に中止された。
languages.original_text: The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの研究は、世界に存在する知識が神への冒涜の標識を多く含んでいたため、最終的に中止された。

languages.text: 始于扎尔科夫的研究最终被叫停，只因这个世界的知识带有太多亵渎的印记。
languages.original_text: The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.

traits.locale_text: 始于扎尔科夫的研究最终被叫停，只因这个世界的知识带有太多亵渎的印记。

languages.text: Les recherches commencées sur Zarkov finirent par être interrompues, du fait des nombreux signes de blasphème décelés dans les connaissances que renfermait ce monde.
languages.original_text: The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.

traits.locale_text: Les recherches commencées sur Zarkov finirent par être interrompues, du fait des nombreux signes de blasphème décelés dans les connaissances que renfermait ce monde.

languages.text: La investigación que había comenzado en Zarkov se detuvo tras un tiempo, pues el saber que contenía el mundo portaba demasiados indicadores de blasfemia.
languages.original_text: The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.

traits.locale_text: La investigación que había comenzado en Zarkov se detuvo tras un tiempo, pues el saber que contenía el mundo portaba demasiados indicadores de blasfemia.

languages.text: Zarkov'da başlatılan araştırmalar, dünyadaki irfanın çok fazla küfür emaresi taşımasından ötürü eninde sonunda durduruldu.
languages.original_text: The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'da başlatılan araştırmalar, dünyadaki irfanın çok fazla küfür emaresi taşımasından ötürü eninde sonunda durduruldu.

languages.text: Die auf Zarkov begonnene Forschung wurde schließlich eingestellt, da das Wissen, das die Welt barg, zu viele Anzeichen von Ketzerei offenbarte.
languages.original_text: The research begun on Zarkov was eventually stopped, for the knowledge the world contained carried too many markers of blasphemy.

traits.locale_text: Die auf Zarkov begonnene Forschung wurde schließlich eingestellt, da das Wissen, das die Welt barg, zu viele Anzeichen von Ketzerei offenbarte.
